title: Flamingo - Software update for just headset
scenario: Selective DFU for headset only completes successfully when both headset and charge case firmware updates are available
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate your connected headset device.
3. Tap the Update button on the device card to open Device Settings.
4. Verify that the Software Update tab is expanded, showing an "Update All" button at the top and separate "Update" buttons for the headset and charge case.
5. Tap the "Update" button next to the headset (not the charge case).
6. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the headset.
expected: The DFU process for just the headset completes successfully. Only the headset is updated to the latest firmware; the charge case firmware remains unchanged.
